textByHash.14ffb2268333eb3b9d7192c9136f895b6826c8f7: Ah, it's you . You've been slacking in your studies, so it's time for an exam.
textByHash.6c944c2c08e36b30cb88a625da7f4adbbb754b99: There are two types of question. One type requires you to find the next object in a pattern.
textByHash.f1705156e6e6a383246c766afc25986915a2a0cc: In the second type I will present you with fifteen cards and a hint. Discover three cards related to the hint, select them and confirm.
textByHash.3cf10f2eaf8f986b3c4f4efc398358a801fcbef0: Let's continue your exam. There are two types of question: In one question you must discover the logical object to come next in a pattern.
textByHash.f21166b4b3ad310b7805712536f822ffd47902af: Pick the object that should come next in the pattern.
textByHash.1da6d4404495c604ef736163c74df5e351d13064: No. No, that's not right at all. Okay, next question.
textByHash.f4b43383a2900d36b8f7b71ed6f5fcd02f3d8ddb: Remember, the goal here is to find the pattern. Look for objects that would have a connection to each other.
textByHash.96721b4277b13e59939f240bb879a5fc3ac1d58f: That's WRONG. Take your time and think about the next question.
textByHash.0708895d899065f58bb81a446926799b389e7f05: No, no, no... That's WRONG! Okay, next question.
textByHash.0ce43f24561faaf10e1c4d2c4e1ba71310a87dcf: How unfortunate, you FAILED. You'd better hit the books and study up for next time.
textByHash.966fee4aefccd97638048657b80750e567b7023e: To exit, use any of the doors in this room.
textByHash.2dc393b4c7a27dc51586d7c78604f112a9079229: Wonderful! Keep up the good work. Next question.
textByHash.c027dd5f838f429d6acae6bb88bd9c62c4012e06: Finally, a pupil using his brains rather than trying to eat them. Next question.
textByHash.98bf37fa1244b89a9dbc1596180281c913e707f5: Finally, a pupil using her brains rather than trying to eat them. Next question.
textByHash.f16f5f375aa677b10d270c81af5dbfd5ef14a56f: Finally, a pupil using their brains rather than trying to eat them. Next question.
textByHash.d23b242838a13b031cac5c3add8a952babff615a: WELL DONE! You've proven your aptitude for pattern recognition. You'll receive a book once you leave the classroom. It is a Book of Knowledge to further your education.
textByHash.fcf4daf77e599b59b320ce32e2b0fe4267185b30: WELL DONE! You've proven your aptitude for pattern recognition.
textByHash.a66aa53a8fbdd674c957fb08afc2164351853b40: Hmm, you already appear to have a Book of Knowledge. You should read that! Still, I will reward you for your work once you leave the room.
textByHash.5256c6b885239f9535d660c51f11d5b714dd5fff: Examine the hint on the right and find three objects that are related to it.
